title: VisionToggle+
description: Enable night vision with F9 keybine, easy night vision! Disable with F10
body:
**🌙 Easy Night Vision**

Version: 1.0 • Mod Loader: Fabric / Forge

Light up the darkness with a single key!
Easy Night Vision lets you toggle Night Vision instantly — no commands, no hassle.

**💡 How it works:**

Press F9 → Enable Night Vision

Press F10 → Disable Night Vision

Perfect for miners, explorers, and builders who want to see clearly without spamming commands or using potions.

**✨ Features:**

Simple and fast keybind system

Works in both Survival and Creative

Customizable keys in the Controls menu

Never fear the dark again — take control of your vision

Mod idea by a discord member! Yara GuXiaoYu
